en.title: KB-C25R Electricity-Free RO Water Filter System 100G | KomiBright
en.description: KB-C25R pumpless reverse osmosis water filter: 100G membrane, 0.0001 μm filtration, auto membrane flushing without power, filters replaced once a year. DIY installation.
en.ogTitle: KB-C25R Electricity-Free RO Water Filter System 100G | KomiBright
en.ogDescription: KB-C25R pumpless reverse osmosis water filter: 100G membrane, 0.0001 μm filtration, auto membrane flushing without power, filters replaced once a year. DIY installation.
en.lead: The flagship pumpless RO system — 0.0001 μm pure water from tap pressure alone, one filter change a year.
checklist: Auto RO membrane flushing — without power
Super compound filter for longer service life
Consumables replaced easily once a year
prose: The KB-C25R is the purest expression of KomiBright's KISS philosophy: a full reverse osmosis system with no pump, no power cord and no redundant fittings. As long as your tap delivers 1.5 bars of pressure, it delivers 0.0001 μm purified water — silently.

Instead of the three to five separate cartridges of a conventional RO machine, the C25R uses one super compound filter (PP + carbon block) and one 100G membrane in a single housing with a modularised waterway. The membrane flushes itself automatically — without electricity — extending its service life, and consumables are replaced in minutes, once a year, by anyone.
en.includedText: RO membrane, combo filter, 3.2G pressure tank, spare parts kit

card.title: KB-C25R 100G Electricity-Free Reverse Osmosis System
card.desc: The flagship pumpless RO system — 0.0001 μm pure water from tap pressure alone, one filter change a year.

zh.h1: KB-C25R 100G 免电反渗透净水器
zh.lead: 旗舰免泵RO净水器——只靠自来水压力，实现0.0001μm级净化，一年只换一次滤芯。
zh.galleryAlt: KB-C25R 100G 免电反渗透净水器
checklist: RO膜自动冲洗，全程无需用电
超级复合滤芯，使用寿命更长
单壳体多膜功能一体化设计
创新阀件，水路自动稳压
耗材一年一换，轻松上手
prose: KB-C25R 是 KomiBright「大道至简」理念最纯粹的体现：一台完整的反渗透净水器，没有泵、没有电源线、没有多余的接头。只要自来水有1.5公斤的水压，它就能安静地产出0.0001μm级的纯水。
传统RO机需要三到五支独立滤芯，C25R 只用一支超级复合滤芯（PP棉+碳纤维）和一支100G RO膜，集成在模块化水路的单一壳体内。RO膜无需用电即可自动冲洗，寿命更长；耗材一年只换一次，几分钟搞定，谁都会换。
zh.includedText: RO膜、复合滤芯、3.2G压力桶、备件包

prose: The KB-C25RH brings pumpless RO purification onto the countertop. Purified water collects in the companion smart jar, ready to pour — ideal for kitchens where under-sink installation isn't practical, for offices, or for rental homes.

It shares the C25R platform: a super compound filter and multi-membrane housing, self-stabilising valves, and a modularised waterway with no redundant fittings. Same 0.0001 μm result, zero electricity.

prose: The KB-C25RP adds a post carbon stage to the proven C25R platform. After the membrane, water passes through a nano-silver composite carbon filter that rounds off the taste — the difference you notice in the first glass.
Everything else stays refreshingly simple: pumpless and electricity-free operation, auto membrane flushing, food-grade PP5 materials, and consumables that anyone can replace once a year.

其余部分依旧简单到极致：免泵免电运行、RO膜自动冲洗、PP5食品级材料，耗材一年一换，谁都能自己动手。

en.h1: KB-C100R Tankless & Pumpless Direct Flow RO System
en.lead: 1000G direct-flow RO in a 304 stainless steel housing — two outlets, no tank, no pump.
en.galleryAlt: KB-C100R Tankless & Pumpless Direct Flow RO System
checklist: 1000G membrane — big direct flow, no tank
Dual outlets: RO drinking + pre-filtered cooking water
External pressure gauge for at-a-glance monitoring
Pleated PP + precision activated carbon compound filter
Modularised waterway with built-in flow restrictor
No pump needed with 3-bar tap pressure
prose: The KB-C100R delivers big-flow, on-demand RO water with no storage tank and no pump. Its CN-3812-1000G membrane purifies water as you draw it, while the 304 stainless steel clamp housing stands up to residential and light commercial duty.

Two outlets make it genuinely practical: one delivers RO water for drinking after the membrane; the other supplies pre-filtered water for cooking and washing food. An external pressure gauge lets you monitor housing pressure at a glance — and with 3 bars of tap pressure, no pump kit is needed at all.

checklist: 双出水口：RO直饮水+预过滤生活用水
外置压力表，压力一目了然
折叠PP棉+精密活性炭复合滤芯
模块化水路，内置限流器

prose: KB-C100R 无需储水桶、无需泵，即滤即饮的大流量RO净水器。CN-3812-1000G大通量膜随取随滤，304不锈钢卡箍外壳足以胜任家用与轻商用场景。
双出水口设计非常实用：一路出RO纯水供直饮，另一路出预过滤水用于做饭洗菜。外置压力表随时掌握壳体内压力——自来水有3公斤压力时，完全不需要加装泵组。

en.lead: Portable reverse osmosis for camping and RV life — purifies tap, river and lake water without power.
checklist: Purifies tap water, rivers and lakes
Pre-PP filter for rough source water
Super compound filter, longer service life
prose: Far from the city, every water source is a question mark. The KB-A95R answers it with true reverse osmosis: 0.0001 μm filtration that removes sediment, microorganisms, bacteria and viruses from tap water, rivers and lakes — with zero electricity.

The compact chassis combines an outdoor filtration system with a genuinely portable format. A pre-PP filter handles rough source water before the compound filter and membrane take over. Camping deep in the mountains or touring by RV, clean drinking water stops being a logistics problem.
en.includedText: RO membrane, combo filter, pre-PP filter, spare parts kit

card.title: KB-A95R 100G Outdoor RO Water Purifier
card.desc: Portable reverse osmosis for camping and RV life — purifies tap, river and lake water without power.

zh.lead: 露营与房车生活的便携反渗透——自来水、河水、湖水都能净化，全程不用电。
checklist: 自来水、河水、湖水均可净化
超级复合滤芯，寿命更长
prose: 远离城市，每一处水源都是未知数。KB-A95R 用真正的反渗透给出答案：0.0001μm过滤精度，去除自来水、河水、湖水中的泥沙、微生物、细菌与病毒——全程零用电。
紧凑机身兼顾了户外过滤系统与真正的便携性。前置PP棉先处理较浑浊的源水，再交给复合滤芯与RO膜。无论深山露营还是房车旅行，喝上干净水不再是件麻烦事。

en.h1: Stainless Steel UF System — Washable PVDF Membrane
en.lead: Whole-house and commercial ultrafiltration in 304 stainless steel — washable membrane, zero waste water, up to 20,000 L/H.
en.galleryAlt: Stainless Steel UF System — Washable PVDF Membrane
checklist: Washable PVDF membrane — wash it, reuse it
304 stainless steel shell, clamp end covers
Detachable water pipe for easy maintenance
prose: For whole-house and commercial water treatment, the KomiBright stainless steel UF range pairs a washable PVDF ultrafiltration membrane with a 304 stainless steel shell. The membrane's 0.01 μm pores strip out fine particles, bacteria and viruses — and unlike disposable cartridges, it can be washed and returned to service.

The external-pressure design produces no waste water, the clamp end covers open without special tools, and the detachable water pipe simplifies maintenance. Seven capacities from 1,000 to 20,000 litres per hour cover everything from a kitchen to a whole building.
en.includedText: UF housing with washable PVDF membrane; capacity configured per order

card.title: Stainless Steel UF System — Washable PVDF Membrane
card.desc: Whole-house and commercial ultrafiltration in 304 stainless steel — washable membrane, zero waste water, up to 20,000 L/H.
card.alt: Stainless Steel UF System — Washable PVDF Membrane

zh.description: 不锈钢超滤系统，可清洗PVDF膜：0.01μm过滤，零废水，卡箍端盖，1000至20000L/H七种流量，适用厨房、全屋与商用。
zh.ogTitle: 不锈钢超滤系统 可洗PVDF膜（1000–20000L/H）| KomiBright
zh.ogDescription: 不锈钢超滤系统，可清洗PVDF膜：0.01μm过滤，零废水，卡箍端盖，1000至20000L/H七种流量，适用厨房、全屋与商用。
zh.h1: 不锈钢超滤系统（可洗PVDF膜）
zh.lead: 304不锈钢全屋/商用超滤——膜可反复清洗，零废水，流量最高20000L/H。
zh.galleryAlt: 不锈钢超滤系统（可洗PVDF膜）
prose: 面向全屋与商用水处理，KomiBright 不锈钢超滤系列将可清洗的PVDF超滤膜与304不锈钢外壳结合。0.01μm膜孔滤除细微颗粒、细菌与病毒——而且不同于一次性滤芯，这支膜洗一洗就能继续用。
外压式设计不产生废水，卡箍端盖无需专用工具即可打开，可拆卸水管让维护更省事。从1000到20000升/小时共七档流量，从一个厨房到一整栋楼都能覆盖。
zh.includedText: 含可洗PVDF膜的超滤主机；流量按订单配置

prose: The membrane is the heart of any RO system. KomiBright systems use Canature membranes: the CN-1812-100G for C25R-series machines and the high-flow CN-3812-1000G for the C100R direct-flow system.
Thanks to the automatic flushing design of KomiBright housings, membranes reach their full service life — replace once a year along with the compound filter, no tools required.

prose: RO膜是整台净水器的心脏。KomiBright 系统采用开能（Canature）膜：C25R系列使用CN-1812-100G，C100R直饮机型使用大通量CN-3812-1000G。

en.title: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910 | KomiBright
en.description: F-210 and F-910 super compound filter cartridges combine pleated PP and precision activated carbon in one housing — the single yearly pre-filter for KomiBright RO systems.
en.ogTitle: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910 | KomiBright
en.ogDescription: F-210 and F-910 super compound filter cartridges combine pleated PP and precision activated carbon in one housing — the single yearly pre-filter for KomiBright RO systems.
en.h1: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910
en.lead: One cartridge that replaces the usual three pre-filters — pleated PP plus precision activated carbon.
en.galleryAlt: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910
checklist: Pleated PP + precision activated carbon in one
Removes sediment, rust, chlorine and odour
F-210 for C25R series, F-910 for C100R
prose: Conventional RO machines stack two or three separate pre-filter cartridges. KomiBright's super compound filter does the same work in one: a pleated PP layer captures particles and sediment, and a precision activated carbon block removes residual chlorine, odour and volatile organics.
The F-210 serves C25R-series systems; the larger F-910 serves the C100R direct-flow platform. Both are replaced once a year together with the membrane.

card.title: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910
card.desc: One cartridge that replaces the usual three pre-filters — pleated PP plus precision activated carbon.
card.alt: Super Compound Filter Cartridge F-210 / F-910

zh.lead: 一支滤芯顶三支前置——折叠PP棉+精密活性炭。
checklist: 折叠PP棉+精密活性炭合二为一
替代多支传统前置滤芯
去除泥沙、铁锈、余氯与异味
prose: 传统RO机要叠两三支前置滤芯，KomiBright 的超级复合滤芯一支搞定：折叠PP棉层拦截颗粒与泥沙，精密活性炭层去除余氯、异味与挥发性有机物。
F-210适配C25R系列，更大的F-910适配C100R直饮平台。两者都与RO膜同步，一年更换一次。

en.title: All Products — RO Systems, UF Systems, Filters | KomiBright
en.description: Browse all KomiBright products: electricity-free RO systems, tankless direct-flow RO, outdoor purifiers, stainless steel UF systems and replacement filters.
en.ogTitle: All Products — RO Systems, UF Systems, Filters | KomiBright
en.ogDescription: Browse all KomiBright products: electricity-free RO systems, tankless direct-flow RO, outdoor purifiers, stainless steel UF systems and replacement filters.
en.lead: Thirteen products across five ranges — every one designed around pumpless, electricity-free filtration and one yearly filter change.

groups.intro: Our core range: reverse osmosis systems that run on tap-water pressure alone — no pump, no power socket, no noise. One compound filter and one membrane, replaced once a year.
Big flow, small footprint. Direct-flow systems skip the storage tank entirely — water is purified on demand through a 1000G membrane.
Take RO-grade water anywhere. Built for campsites, RVs and anywhere the grid doesn't reach — the same 0.0001 μm filtration, in a carry-anywhere format.
Industrial-grade filtration for the whole house or business: 304 stainless steel housings, washable PVDF membranes, and capacities from 1,000 to 20,000 litres per hour.
Every consumable your system needs — engineered to be replaced by anyone, once a year, without tools or a technician.

zh.title: 全部产品 — RO净水器、超滤系统与滤芯 | KomiBright
zh.description: 浏览KomiBright全部产品：免电RO净水器、无桶直饮RO、户外净水器、不锈钢超滤系统与替换滤芯。
zh.ogTitle: 全部产品 — RO净水器、超滤系统与滤芯 | KomiBright
zh.ogDescription: 浏览KomiBright全部产品：免电RO净水器、无桶直饮RO、户外净水器、不锈钢超滤系统与替换滤芯。
zh.lead: 五大系列共13款产品——每一款都围绕免泵免电过滤与一年一换滤芯设计。

groups.intro: 这是我们的核心产品线：只靠自来水压力工作的反渗透净水器——不用泵、不插电、零噪音。一支复合滤芯加一支RO膜，一年只需更换一次。
大流量、小体积。直饮机型完全省去储水桶，1000G大通量RO膜即滤即饮，新鲜看得见。
把RO级好水带到任何地方。为露营地、房车和电网到不了的地方而生——同样的0.0001μm过滤精度，随身携带。
面向全屋和商用场景的工业级过滤：304不锈钢外壳，可清洗PVDF膜，流量从1000到20000升/小时可选。
系统所需的全部耗材——设计得足够简单，任何人一年换一次，不需要工具，也不需要师傅上门。

en.title: FAQ — Pumpless RO Systems | KomiBright
en.description: Answers on electricity-free reverse osmosis: required water pressure, filter replacement, what 0.0001 μm removes, OEM/ODM and export.
en.ogTitle: FAQ — Pumpless RO Systems | KomiBright
en.ogDescription: Answers on electricity-free reverse osmosis: required water pressure, filter replacement, what 0.0001 μm removes, OEM/ODM and export.

mainEntity.name: How can a reverse osmosis system work without electricity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reverse osmosis only needs pressure, not electricity. Conventional RO machines add an electric booster pump; KomiBright systems are engineered with innovative self-stabilising valves, an integrated flow restrictor and a low-resistance waterway so that normal municipal tap pressure (from 1.5 bar) is enough to push water through the 0.0001 μm membrane.

mainEntity.name: What water pressure do I need?

acceptedAnswer.text: C25R-series systems run on 21–70 PSI (1.5–5 bar). The KB-C100R direct-flow system needs 30–70 PSI (2–5 bar); with 3 bars of tap pressure it needs no pump kit at all. If your pressure is lower, a pump kit can be added.

mainEntity.name: How often do filters need replacing, and can I do it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Once a year — that's the whole maintenance schedule. One compound filter and one membrane, both designed for tool-free replacement in minutes. No technician visit needed.

mainEntity.name: What does 0.0001 μm filtration actually remove?

acceptedAnswer.text: The RO membrane removes dissolved salts, heavy metal ions, bacteria, viruses and organic contaminants. Upstream, the compound filter removes sediment, rust, residual chlorine, odour and volatile organic compounds.

mainEntity.name: Do you support OEM / ODM orders?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. KomiBright is the original brand, original designer and patent owner, with a professional R&D department. OEM and ODM orders are welcome — housing colours and configurations can be customized, and our team supports you from engineering through export.

Our products are used in nearly 30 countries worldwide. From raw material purchasing to export, every step is controlled by IQC, PQC and OQC quality processes. Contact us for lead times and shipping terms for your market.

zh.title: 常见问题 — 免泵RO净水器 | KomiBright
zh.description: 关于免电反渗透的常见疑问：所需水压、滤芯更换、0.0001μm能去除什么、OEM/ODM与出口事宜。
zh.ogTitle: 常见问题 — 免泵RO净水器 | KomiBright
zh.ogDescription: 关于免电反渗透的常见疑问：所需水压、滤芯更换、0.0001μm能去除什么、OEM/ODM与出口事宜。

mainEntity.name: 反渗透净水器怎么可能不用电？

acceptedAnswer.text: 反渗透需要的是压力，不是电。传统RO机靠电动增压泵提供压力；KomiBright 通过创新自稳压阀件、集成限流器和低阻力水路设计，让普通市政自来水压力（1.5公斤起）就足以把水压过0.0001μm的RO膜。
C25R系列在21–70 PSI（1.5–5 bar）下工作。KB-C100R直饮机需要30–70 PSI（2–5 bar），水压达到3公斤即可完全免泵使用。水压偏低的地区可以加装泵组。

mainEntity.name: 滤芯多久换一次？自己能换吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 一年一次，这就是全部的保养计划。一支复合滤芯加一支RO膜，都是免工具设计，几分钟换好，不需要师傅上门。

mainEntity.name: 0.0001μm的过滤精度到底能去除什么？

acceptedAnswer.text: RO膜可去除溶解盐、重金属离子、细菌、病毒与有机污染物。在此之前，复合滤芯先去除泥沙、铁锈、余氯、异味和挥发性有机物。
支持。KomiBright 是原创品牌、原创设计与专利持有者，拥有专业研发部门。欢迎OEM与ODM订单——外壳颜色与配置均可定制，从工程到出口全程有团队对接。
我们的产品已进入全球近30个国家。从原材料采购到出口交付，全程由IQC、PQC、OQC质检流程把控。欢迎联系我们了解您所在市场的交期与贸易条款。
